exercises.title: Vowels that lean on R
exercises.body: English has a whole family of vowels that blend straight into an “r” sound — car, four, hair, her. Shavian gives each of these its own single letter instead of spelling them vowel-plus-r. Let's meet the first two.

exercises.title: Meet are
exercises.body: The letter for are is 𐑸, the sound in car and far.

exercises.caption: Sound it out — what does this say?

exercises.title: Meet or
exercises.body: The letter for or is 𐑹, the sound in four and form.

exercises.caption: Sound it out — what does this say?
